---
title: "analyzer.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\analyzer.ts"
loc: 246
complexity: 40
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.91
intel_score: 5.74
overall_score: 3.05
---

## Intent
The `analyzer.ts` module is the primary structural sensor for the Corvus Star repository. It performs deep AST analysis (via Tree-sitter) to extract cyclomatic complexity, logical density, imports, and exports, which are then used to calculate the Gungnir Matrix scores (L, S, I, G, V, Ω).

## Interaction Protocol
Call the `analyzeFile` function with the source code and file path. It returns a `FileData` object containing the comprehensive structural and aesthetic metrics of the target sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 52 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [getParser](file://./parser.ts)
- [TreeSitter](file://./parser.ts)
- [*](file://node:crypto)
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [*](file://node:fs)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [calculateLogicScore](file://./calculus/logic.ts)
- [calculateStyleScore](file://./calculus/style.ts)
- [calculateIntelScore](file://./calculus/intel.ts)
- [getFileGravity](file://./intel/gravity_db.ts)
- [registry](file://./pathRegistry.ts)
- [GungnirMatrix](file://./types.ts)
- [FileData](file://./types.ts)

### Exports
- `analyzeFile`
- `analyzeFile`
- `loc`
- `hash`
- `endpoints`
- `isApi`
- `docResult`
- `gravity`
- `getParser`
- `tree`
- `complexity`
- `maxNesting`
- `imports`
- `exports`
- `complexityQuerySource`
- `complexityQuery`
- `matches`
- `traverse`
- `i`
- `child`
- `pyQuery`
- `pyMatches`
- `node`
- `jsQuery`
- `jsMatches`
- `node`
- `sourceNodes`
- `src`
- `specifiers`
- `importedNode`
- `aliasNode`
- `imported`
- `local`
- `specifiers`
- `aliasNode`
- `nameNode`
- `exported`
- `idNode`
- `idNodes`
- `filtered`
- `logicValue`
- `style`
- `intel`
- `gravity`
- `anomalyScore`
- `vigilScore`
- `aesthetic`
- `penalty`
- `overall`
- `stability`
- `coupling`
- `sovereignty`
- `calculateVigilScore`
- `root`
- `absPath`
- `stem`
- `isPy`
- `isTs`
- `score`
- `featurePath`
- `groupFeaturePath`
- `hasLore`
- `hasTest`
- `testPath`
- `testPath`
- `altTestPath`
- `detectEndpoints`
- `endpoints`
- `routeRegex`
- `nextJsRegex`
- `fastapiRegex`
- `match`
- `rel`
- `getSystemAnomaly`
- `statePath`
- `raw`
- `data`
- `analyzeMarkdown`
- `imports`
- `exports`
- `linkRegex`
- `match`
- `nameMatch`
- `calculateLOC`
- `isPython`
- `commentRegex`
- `cleanCode`
- `content`
